adaptation.description: Surface price deltas and finish descriptions in variant pill labels so users understand pricing impact before clicking
changes: Added delta() helper — formats +$X.XX relative to base option for each dimension
Size pills: existing mm hint retained; badge shows +$X.XX for A5 vs A6
Finish pills: added FINISH_DESC hints ('no glare', 'vivid light-catching', 'see-through'); badge for non-zero finish deltas
Sheet count pills: badge shows +$X.XX per extra sheet vs base
Group component: accepts badge prop; pills reshaped to rounded-2xl to accommodate two-line layout with hint below label
sell/page.tsx Group reuse unaffected — Group is additive (badge/hint are optional)

kpi_delta_note: Deterministic synthetic cohort (seed=42) is engine-only; UI changes do not affect simulation outcomes. Zero delta is expected and correct — confirms no engine regression from the UI change.
verdict_rationale: Adaptation applied cleanly; KPIs stable (no regression); guardrail intact. Variant-clarity improvement is observable in the UI (price deltas visible in picker) and addresses H5/H7 heuristic gaps from QA critique without touching contracts, seeds, or engine logic.
non_claims: does not prove real user conversion uplift from variant-clarity change
synthetic cohort cannot measure UI-driven behavior change
does not prove mobile rendering of two-line pill layout
